goal: Make AI trading REAL (non-custodial funds on Base Sepolia) AND make self-improvement actually produce promotable strategies

vault-real-base-sepolia.metric: 1 bot trades real funds non-custodially on Base Sepolia: deposit -> agent swap -> depositor withdraw, operator never custodies
vault-real-base-sepolia.baseline: 0 — vaults deployed only on local anvil(31338)+HL test(998/999); live fleet bots are factory:0x0 placeholders; all paper
vault-real-base-sepolia.target: 1 funded bot, full loop proven on 84532
vault-real-base-sepolia.blocker: deployer 0x2420 has 0.00286 ETH on Base Sepolia — insufficient to deploy contract suite. NEEDS FAUCET (Drew). Real exec path + deploy script ARE built.
vault-real-base-sepolia.metricClaims: This is the entire product thesis — non-custodial agent trading. Until proven on a real chain with real funds it is a demo, not a fundable product. The single experiment that turns 'well-architected' into 'real'.

self-improve-produces.metric: # candidates that pass gates and promote (per cycle)
self-improve-produces.baseline: 0 — every one of 15+ historical runs BLOCKED; loop is dormant (never auto-triggers)
self-improve-produces.target: >=1 promotable candidate; loop auto-runs on cadence
self-improve-produces.rootCause: candidates were backtest-only, needed >=20 PAPER trades to promote, and never accumulated tagged forward evidence. Round 4 added box-side cadence and paper-trial orchestration. Round 5 added an auditable risk-budget decision layer so time-sensitive candidates that pass hard backtest/overfit gates can receive capped tiny-live probes before paper evidence accrues. Round 6 extended that fast path to Hyperliquid outcome markets by reusing Hyperliquid transport while tagging, valuing, and capping them like binary prediction markets. Round 7 added post-probe live drift evaluation and automatic decision demotion from venue marks, so live probes can be shut off when loss/slippage budgets breach; full active promotion still requires forward evidence.
self-improve-produces.metricClaims: Self-improving agents is the moat. Zero promotions today = the loop is theater. One real promotion = a measurably better strategy = better depositor PnL, autonomously.

nextDispatch: /evolve round-8: deploy this branch to the live box, run a time-sensitive prediction-market candidate through /evolution/promotion-gate, confirm risk_decision.action=live_probe, submit one Polymarket CLOB capped probe and one Hyperliquid outcome dry/live probe carrying risk_budget_decision_id plus matching candidate_hash/revision_id, then call /evolution/risk-budget/decisions/{decision_id}/live-drift with venue marks and confirm keep_live/demote behavior. Base Sepolia vault-real remains blocked until deployer 0x2420 is funded; after funding, broadcast DeployTradingContracts.s.sol.
